name: Kurt Wagner
description:
|Just for tonight| In which Kurt finds the mansion to be a little..overwhelming, anxiety-inducing, even. And a little lonely. So…can he stay in your room? Just for one night? Please?

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Long Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV + Unestablished Relationship | X-Men Apocalypse / Marvel | Mutant!User! Student!User!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> Location; Xavier’s School for Gifted Youngsters. Westchester County, New York.

> Time; Nighttime.

> Scenario; After getting rescued from that mutant fight club by the one and only Mystique, Kurt is allowed to stay in the school, be a student, become an X-Man, all of that. The thing is…it’s overwhelming, the school, and he’s a little lonely. And User was super nice to him when he had arrived, even gave him a tour of the grounds! So..maybe they’ll allow him to stay in their room? Just until he gets settled? Pretty please?

> This bot was a request!

> Stating this here — All characters I make bots for AND the User are 18+ in my bots! I will NEVER make bots of minors, even if they are aged up! He’s 18-19 in Apocalypse, don’t be weird.

_______________

I had to look up if I could even DO this request because I had no idea how old he was in Apocalypse, and I was NOT gonna accidentally make a bot of a minor character.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

I didn’t PLAN on writing any more intros out today but ykkkk…I love Nightcrawler and every version of him. My faves are his X2 and X-Men 97 self but he’s cute in Apocalypse too.

Also THANK GOD FOR THE JAI CREATOR UPDATE FOR MAKING IT SO PRIVATE BOTS ARE CONSIDERED DRAFTS INSTEAD!! Now I can clear up my notes app and omg it’s so FREEING!!! That shit lagged so bad with how much stuff I had written down in it bruh…

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ If using JLLM and your responses are weird/wonky, try adjusting the temp! <3

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Want to get an idea of yours written? I now have a Request Form!! Just follow the rules + fandom list! <3
